creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
Hello Nuno,
thanks for your patience while waiting for me to get back to you! I managed to make some progress by adding following lines to Makefile

...
TEST_DEPENDS=   ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}tox>=0:devel/py-tox@${PY_FLAVOR} \
                pylint-py${PYTHON_SUFFIX}>=0:devel/pylint \
                ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sqlite3>=0:databases/py-sqlite3@${PY_FLAVOR} \
                memcached>=0:databases/memcached \
                sphinx-build:textproc/py-sphinx
...
do-test:
        @cd ${WRKSRC} && ${PYTHON_CMD} -m tox
...

the only errors I am seeing right now are those in attached tests.log file: have you ever seen anything similar happening for other ports? Thank you
